title: elaphoboscum
intro: Elaphoboscum is a genus of lichens that belongs to the family of fungi, specifically the order of ascomycota. These lichens have been traditionally used in various cultures for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elaphoboscum lichens include their ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Elaphoboscum is often prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and it can also be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
